note: Mathlib/Analysis/Complex/Hadamard.lean:458-463 formalizes the Hadamard three-LINE theorem (log-convexity of sup‖f‖ on vertical strips re z in [0,1]), the strip analog of the three-CIRCLE theorem (log-convexity of max‖f‖ on concentric circles in an annulus); same underlying technique/name but a distinct classical statement (strip vs. annulus, no direct decl for circles) -- not exact.
verify_note: Decl confirmed to exist (line 463, doc-gen4 cache hit); read full source/docstring: file header explicitly titles it 'Hadamard three-lines Theorem' over vertical strips re z in [0,1], not the three-circle theorem over concentric circles (Q729359 confirmed via Wikidata label/sitelink); grepped mathlib4 for three-circle/threeCircle decls -- none exist. match_kind 'related' (not 'exact') is the honest, correctly non-overclaiming label.
